hooks.command: node -e "const f='.claude/memory-bank/state/tasks.md'; const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync(f)){process.exit(0);} const t=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'); const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); if(!t.includes(today)){console.error('[memory-bank] Source files were modified — remember to update .claude/memory-bank after this task');}"

node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const f='.claude/memory-bank/state/tasks.md'; if(!fs.existsSync(f)){process.exit(0);} const t=fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'); const today=new Date().toISOString().slice(0,10); const updated=t.includes(today); if(!updated){console.error('[memory-bank] tasks.md was NOT updated today. Run /sync-memory to check for drift.');} else {console.log('[memory-bank] tasks.md updated today.');}"
